divergence.preamble: Pin every finding to the installed `inertiajs/inertia-laravel` and `@inertiajs/*` versions — do not suggest v2 APIs (deferred props, polling, prefetching, merge props) on a v1 install. Match the idiom to the installed adapter (`@inertiajs/vue3`, `@inertiajs/react`, or `@inertiajs/svelte`) — never Vue examples for a React codebase or vice versa.
